dict.string: en
CrownQuest
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
$(PRODUCT_NAME)
APPL
$(MARKETING_VERSION)
$(CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION)
This app uses location to provide location-based crown stories and historical information.
This app needs access to camera to take photos of crowns and share them with the community.
This app needs access to photo library to save and share crown images.
This app may use microphone for voice recordings related to crown stories.
This app may access contacts to share crown stories with friends.
This app may access calendar to schedule crown-related events and reminders.
This app may access reminders to set up crown study schedules.
This app may use motion sensors to enhance the crown exploration experience.
This app may access health data to track learning progress and study time.
This app may update health data to track learning achievements.
This app uses Face ID for secure access to your crown collection and progress.
This app would like to track you across apps and websites to provide personalized crown content and improve your learning experience.
This app uses local network to discover nearby crown enthusiasts and share stories.
This app uses Bluetooth to connect with nearby devices for crown sharing features.
This app uses Bluetooth to share crown data with other devices.
This app may access Apple Music to play historical music related to crown stories.
This app may access HomeKit to control smart home devices during crown study sessions.
This app uses speech recognition to help you learn crown-related terms and pronunciations.
This app uses location to provide location-based crown stories and historical information.
This app uses location to provide location-based crown stories and historical information.
LaunchScreen
com.crownquest
Default Configuration
$(PRODUCT_MODULE_NAME).SceneDelegate
